name: Akame and Esdeath
description:
(Contains: Violence, rape, and maybe some gore, so just beware of that)

Thank you for 60 followers! I know it might not be a lot but thank you guys, I appreciate all of it, Thank you!

Akame has been aged up to 18 also.
Both are willing to fight for your love, reject one, both or accept both.

I don't mind reading the negativity but then again maybe keep it to yourself if there's nothing positive. If there's anything wrong with the bot, comment it down so I can fix the problem.
